name: freshell-claude-sidecar
description: The ONE sanctioned Node sidecar for the freshell Rust port (ADR Decision 2). A thin stdio JSON protocol server wrapping @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk (SdkBridge), which has NO Rust equivalent. Spoken newline-JSON over stdin/stdout by crates/freshell-freshagent (claude WS slice). Its @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk dependency is VENDORED in THIS package's node_modules, never the repo root. Graded by the oracle T2 claude/Haiku tier.
